positive: A minimalist and elegant design featuring a stylized, roaring lion's head silhouette integrated with celestial elements. The lion's mane should transition into wispy nebula cloud forms, outlined by thin, glowing gold lines. The background is deep midnight indigo and cosmic violet, giving a sense of infinite depth. Composition is centered, with the main subject occupying the upper two-thirds for optimal apparel placement. Style is neo-geometric, detailed line art mixed with soft gradients. Lighting is dramatic backlighting, making the golden outline glow intensely against the dark cosmic colors. High contrast, clean vectors, perfect for direct-to-garment printing. Focus on sharp details and strong silhouettes.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, noise, low detail, realistic photo, low resolution, messy, grunge, cartoon, childish
